constraints: Do not promote this exploratory idea into canonical shared work without explicit operator direction.

evidence_summary.strategy_summary: Real swarm evidence and authority coverage both indicate that the objective is valid but the original subsystem form is obsolete under current authority.

operator_actions.label: choose_path
operator_actions.instruction: Select one ideation option or reject the candidate entirely.

options.name: Reject As Subsumed
options.summary: Do not add a new subsystem because the core separation is already sufficiently covered by C45 plus C47, with economics already modeled in C18 and C22.
options.main_upside: No architectural churn and no risk of reviving superseded old-stack topology.
options.main_risk: Leaves the remaining internal model-capacity scheduling gap implicit rather than explicit.

options.name: Model Capacity Control Plane
options.summary: Keep the objective but redesign it into a narrower internal control plane for model-serving allocation, placement, caching, and admission under C45 and C47.
options.main_upside: Preserves the efficiency goal without creating a free-floating inference authority.
options.main_risk: Requires coordinated redesign across C45, C47, C18, and C22.

options.name: Sovereign Inference Fabric
options.summary: Add a real new internal subsystem that unifies leased and native inference substrates as schedulable sovereign capacity beneath current wrappers and membrane controls.
options.main_upside: Creates a durable internal serving substrate that cleanly spans Phase 1 leased cognition and Phase 2/3 native model operation.
options.main_risk: This is the heaviest option and would force downstream redesign tasks before it becomes coherent.

options.name: C45-C47 Addendum Path
options.summary: Do not create a new subsystem; instead patch the existing architecture with direct-spec addenda that make backend-pool semantics and model-promotion handoff explicit.
options.main_upside: Cheapest path that still makes the decoupling objective concrete.
options.main_risk: May under-specify the problem if the real need is a cross-cutting capacity allocator rather than a few addenda.

research_strategy_summary: Stop after ideation and wait for operator path selection. No research or specification is authorized yet.
